name: SPLIT
description: SPLIT is an underwater survival game where you control a magical bubble rising through the deep ocean. Your goal is simple — survive as long as possible while dodging waves of colorful fish attacking from all directions. The longer you last, the higher your score climbs and the more intense the challenge gets.
instructions: Controls are straightforward On desktop use the Left and Right arrow keys or A and D to drift sideways and hold Spacebar to split your bubble On mobile tap and hold anywhere on screen to split and swipe or tilt your touch to navigate Press or tap o
